{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195412A10B9316A60FDA24E486"}"},"total":77},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7306025637810357030","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油，很好看，细节方面暂且不论，能避免各朝各代的意难平，弥补一些历史的遗憾，我感觉很好，五星好评，加油！！！！！","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266852DA24E486%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227306025637810357030%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227274032043007151159%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701068058,"group_id":"7274032043007151159","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"君子和而不同","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1PQNPd/+/VPn0t3tfov0Kkb2hs6XeM2Ni4nOOW1A0DD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bfa1c37612b14c61b57aef354b2e8f88~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795127&x-signature=32ILQRQbWrx6mtZnaNZb6sR3AH0%3D","user_id":"3403732353286232","user_name":"惟愿清泠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3403732353286232","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7274032043007151159","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来林墨穿越到大秦，获得最强位面帝王辅助系统。
只要绑定位面，辅助当下位面的帝王，对应的位面实力越强，自己获得的奖励将会越多。
“贤弟我摊牌了，其实我是大秦帝王嬴政，如今我大秦四海归一，我邀请贤弟入朝为官。”
“老赵你猜怎么着，其实我是来自另一个世界，来大秦就是辅助你的。
赵高，李斯会造反，胡亥登基称帝，大秦二世而亡。”
次日，赵高满门超斩李斯被流放，胡亥五马分尸。
大汉。
“朕乃大汉帝王刘彻，尔等是何身份？”
嬴政笑了。
“你们后世都喜欢叫我秦始皇，你的老祖是不是叫刘邦。
你们老刘家夺了我大秦的天下，在这个位面已经被我满门抄斩了。”
一番亲密沟通。
“林公子，我要回去杀人！！！”
大唐。
“我乃秦王李世民，尔等刁民见到本王还不跪下？”
林墨，嬴政眼前一亮，逼王李二登场先揍一顿再说。
“哎哟我去，两位两位别揍了别揍了，我的容颜。”
华夏所有的位面全部开启，所有的帝王互相集合，互相帮助征战各个位面。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8add4c844ce663883a18194884a64071~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"回忆的独奏","author_id":"","book_id":"7274032043007151159","book_name":"开启穿越后，历代帝王玩疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2015人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":377,"name":"大秦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=377&name=大秦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7274032334213972538","read_count":"2015","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1087062"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"372","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,大秦","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/780b9891263a9035c5fe318c86f5c064~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450852&x-signature=Hu9dcUBIevWon5kXjXMXg2x7Y4s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2938334207551096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.3006281e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323195412A10B9316A60FDA24E486"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13006,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8511
